steps.title: Connect the two experiments
steps.content: Text 2 says dipeptides in soy sauce enhance umami and also contribute to saltiness. Text 1 says Sato and Kearns used mushroom and seaweed broths to define pure umami flavor.

steps.title: Infer what the broths lacked
steps.content: Choice A invents a claim about national diets. Choice B makes an unsupported molecular-weight comparison. Choice C overstates the role of proteins from fermentation. The remaining statement follows because substantial dipeptides would have added saltiness to the pure-umami broths. The answer is D.
